🔥 Firebase Configuration
Firebase (Realtime Database)
Cloud sync for student data across devices
Disconnected

Firebase credentials are sensitive. Only the ICT Teacher should configure this.

Get these values from the Firebase Console → Project Settings → Your apps → Web app config.
⚠ Both REB eLearning Monitor and Smart Classroom Manager now use the Realtime Database. Make sure it is enabled in your Firebase Console.
🔄 Data Management
Reset & Start Fresh
Clears all students and session records from local storage and Firebase. Use this to begin recording real data for a new academic term. This cannot be undone.

Dashboard
eLearning monitoring — ICT Teacher oversight
☁ Synced
ℹ️ Your Role: As ICT Teacher, you are not registered on elearning.reb.rw. Each student logs in with their own REB credentials. You run monitoring sessions — asking each student where they have reached, checking their module progress, and verifying whether they have uploaded their assessments per module.

📚 ETD (English Teacher Development) applies to ALL streams — modules B1L1, B2L1, B3L1, I1L1, I2L1, I3L1 are worked after enrolment. Mathematics, TMP Maths, TMP SET & Integrated Sciences apply only to Y2 ECLPE, Y2 SME&B, Y3 ECLPE, Y3 SME&B. All courses are on elearning.reb.rw.

About Us

TTC de la Salle Byumba · Smart Classroom & eLearning Portal

✕

🎓 Our Institution

TTC de la Salle Byumba is a Teacher Training College located in Byumba, Northern Province, Rwanda. Operated by the De La Salle Brothers, we are committed to excellence in teacher education, forming future educators equipped with knowledge, values, and 21st‑century skills.

Key Figures
3
Year Programme
10+
Subject Streams
2026
Academic Year
Our Mission

📖 Mission

To provide quality teacher education rooted in Catholic values, nurturing competent, reflective and ethical teachers who contribute to Rwanda's national development through the transformation of education.

🔬 Smart Classroom Initiative

This portal is the heart of our Smart Classroom Resource Manager — a digital ecosystem that integrates REB eLearning progress tracking, ICT lab management, library systems, and classroom equipment inventory into one unified platform, empowering teachers and administrators with real-time data.
